# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_TARGET', defaultValue: '', description: 'Target deployment server (e.g., prod-server-1)')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactPath = "/tmp/${params.ARTIFACT_URL.split('/')[-1]}"
                    sh "wget -O ${artifactPath} ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    env.ARTIFACT_PATH = artifactPath
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sshagent(['your-ssh-key-id']) {
                        sh """
                            scp ${env.ARTIFACT_PATH} user@${params.DEPLOY_TARGET}:destination/path
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo 'Artifact deployed successfully!'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Failed to deploy artifact.'
        }
    }
}
